business.name: Harborlight Flower Studio
business.summary: A floral design studio with a calm coastal character, focused on thoughtful arrangements for gifts, gatherings, and meaningful moments.

audience.primary: People seeking artful flowers for personal gifts, homes, celebrations, and events.
needs: Clear information about available floral services
A simple way to discuss an order or event
Confidence in the studio style and approach
Details about location, delivery, pickup, and timing

offerings.name: Seasonal arrangements
offerings.description: Thoughtful floral pieces designed around the character and availability of each season.

offerings.name: Event flowers
offerings.description: Floral design for intimate gatherings, celebrations, ceremonies, and receptions.

offerings.name: Custom floral work
offerings.description: Made to order flowers shaped around an occasion, setting, or personal request.

brand.voice: Clear, thoughtful, and welcoming, with simple language and gentle confidence.
brand.aesthetic: An editorial botanical style inspired by natural light, coastal stillness, and the texture of fresh stems. Use generous space, expressive floral photography, refined type, and restrained decoration.

signatureMove.name: Harborlight bloom
signatureMove.description: A botanical silhouette slowly comes into focus as visitors move through the opening section, echoing flowers emerging in soft morning light.
signatureMove.touchFallback: On touch devices, the complete botanical image remains visible while the page scrolls normally. No content depends on interaction.
signatureMove.reducedMotion: When reduced motion is enabled, the complete botanical image appears as a still composition with no transition.

content.headline: Flowers shaped with a quiet sense of occasion.
content.subheadline: Seasonal arrangements and floral design for gifts, gatherings, and the spaces you care about.
content.about: Harborlight Flower Studio brings a calm, artful approach to flowers. Each piece can begin with the season, the setting, and the feeling you want to share.
content.contactPrompt: Share your occasion, timing, and what you have in mind. The studio can then confirm options and next steps.

inferred.label: Core audience
inferred.value: People ordering flowers for gifts, homes, celebrations, and events

inferred.label: Offering mix
inferred.value: Seasonal arrangements, event flowers, and custom floral work

inferred.label: Brand direction
inferred.value: Calm coastal botanical style with an editorial feel
